catalysts.thesis: Rhythm faces a dual-catalyst setup with a March 20, 2026 PDUFA for IMCIVREE in Acquired Hypothalamic Obesity and imminent Japanese cohort data. Strong TRANSCEND trial data de-risks the approval, yet the market is underestimating the total addressable market expansion.
catalysts.catalyst_details: PDUFA target action date on March 20, 2026, for IMCIVREE (Setmelanotide) treating Acquired Hypothalamic Obesity [1.1].
catalysts.absorption_status: The market has not fully priced in the label expansion due to macroeconomic biotech sluggishness, leaving a significant gap between the current valuation and the peak sales potential.
catalysts.prediction_market: 85% probability of FDA approval based on precedent and clinical data.
catalysts.recency_proof: SEC 8-K filings and FDA calendar updates as of March 2026.
catalysts.risk: A surprise Complete Response Letter (CRL) or labeling restrictions could severely impact revenue projections.
catalysts.expected_upside: 25-35% upon approval and positive Japan cohort data.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Options market implied volatility is lower than historical averages for biotech PDUFAs of this magnitude, indicating complacency.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Retail buzz is quiet; smart money accumulation evident in dark pools.

catalysts.thesis: Major 10% owner General Atlantic aggressively accumulated 2.8 million shares between March 9-11, 2026, signaling immense conviction. Despite strong Q4 metrics including 34% YoY revenue growth, the stock remains artificially depressed.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Form 4 filings revealed massive insider buying of over $50M by General Atlantic at prices between $17.35 and $18.41, concluding on March 11, 2026.
catalysts.absorption_status: General market weakness in SaaS multiples has masked Alkami's fundamental strength, meaning the insider accumulation has not yet triggered a technical breakout.
catalysts.prediction_market: N/A - Insider aggression heavily implies near-term upside.
catalysts.recency_proof: Form 4 filings filed with the SEC and disclosed March 13, 2026.
catalysts.risk: Prolonged sector rotation out of mid-cap software could delay the realization of value.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Net dollar retention is 115% with ARR churn under 1%, yet the stock trades at a severe discount to peers with inferior retention metrics.
catalysts.x_sentiment: FinTwit is just catching on to the Form 4 drop.

catalysts.thesis: SAIC delivered a massive +13.4% EPS surprise for Q4 on March 13, 2026. Institutional money managers are likely to undergo positive earnings revisions, setting up a classic Post-Earnings Announcement Drift (PEAD) play.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Q4 earnings released on March 13, 2026, beat analyst estimates by over 13% on the bottom line, alongside a slight top-line beat.
catalysts.absorption_status: The stock experienced a muted initial reaction due to broader market noise, leaving the fundamental earnings beat completely unpriced.
catalysts.prediction_market: High probability of upward analyst price target revisions next week.
catalysts.recency_proof: Zacks earnings surprise report published March 13, 2026.
catalysts.risk: Government contract delays or macro defense budget cuts could taper forward guidance momentum.
catalysts.expected_upside: 10-15% as analysts revise targets and institutional buying drifts the price higher.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Historical PEAD analysis shows SAIC drifts an average of 8% over the 30 days following a double-digit EPS surprise.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Quant accounts flagging the EPS beat anomaly.
